title: Classic Lucky Blocks
description: Adds the classic styled lucky blocks to minecraft!
body:
# Lucky Blocks Datapack

This datapack is a recreation of the classic 1.9 minecraft edition lucky blocks mod. Adding lucky blocks, craftable with 8 gold and a dropper. To create a block with 100 random drops, unlocked when breaking it either with a pickaxe or by explosions

Lucky Blocks will now naturally generate in your world, being lucky, unlucky, or normal blocks. And crafting a lucky block will always give you a normal lucky block. This also adds some new items, being the lucky and unlucky potions, and lucky sword and bow. Being fully maxed out enchanted items.

![Lucky Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0098cc463f2c83e2c4efb090903748c34b1aabdd.png)

The lucky blocks are built specifically so that it is easy to edit the drops. Feel free to take my datapack and use it to create your own custom lucky blocks, as the original mod once did, with credit both to me and the original mod.

### Credits

HAK0TA538 - Programming and Models

Based on - [Original Lucky Block Mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lucky-block)
